heading: Equipment and weapons
label: 904 Equipment and weapons
text: The Secretary shall furnish Department police officers with such weapons and related equipment as the Secretary determines to be necessary and appropriate.
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior section 904 was renumbered .section 2304 of this titleProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 218(d) of this titlePub. L. 102–83, § 2(a)
